title: antidesma excavatum var. indutum
intro: Antidesma excavatum var. indutum, also known as the 'dwarf coral tree', is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Antidesma excavatum var. indutum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
